GatorpH 1.0
  • Reference

Fit pH Curve using NLME

Source: R/utils.R
fit_pH_curve.Rd

Fits a pharmacodynamic model to pH data using nonlinear mixed-effects modeling. If `stratify` is TRUE, fits separate models for each group.

Usage

fit_pH_curve(
  data,
  model,
  amt,
  stratify = FALSE,
  estmethod = "focei",
  dose_time = 5
)

Arguments

data

Data frame containing pH data. Must include columns: pH, time, id, group.

model

rxode2/nlmixr2 model to fit.

amt

Dose amount to administer at time 0.

stratify

Logical indicating whether to fit separate models for each group (default is FALSE).

estmethod

Estimation method to use (default is "focei").

dose_time

Time (positive) of baseline to add before time 0 (default is 5).

Value

nlmixr2 fit object.

Author

Omar I. Elashkar

On this page
